title: Measles and Rubella Weekly Monitoring Reports - 2025 - Canada.ca
content:
## Measles and Rubella Weekly Monitoring Reports - 2025
As of March 21, 2025, the weekly surveillance reports and monitoring maps are now available in an interactive dashboard.
View interactive measles and rubella data
Browse older surveillance reports for measles and rubella cases in 2025.
